methods.description: Process for preparing and cleaning wares used for sample collection and storage to ensure purity and prevent contamination.

steps.description: All wares used for sample collection and storing were soaked in 10% hydrochloric acid solution for 7 days.
steps.searchable_summary: soak wares in 10% hydrochloric acid solution for 7 days

steps.description: Wares were then dried after being washed by deionizer water thoroughly.
steps.searchable_summary: wash wares with deionized water and dry

steps.description: All cleaning procedures were performed in a class-100 clean laboratory.
steps.searchable_summary: perform cleaning in class-100 clean laboratory

methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the experimental data to determine the significance of results.

steps.description: All tests were carried out in triplicate, and a one-way analysis of variance (ANOVA) and full factorial analysis were performed using Minitab for statistical analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: perform ANOVA and full factorial analysis using Minitab

steps.description: Differences were considered statistically significant when p < 0.05.
